creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tobik
Date: Wed Nov 29 13:54:31 UTC 2017
New revision: 455111
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/455111

Log:
  bsd.gecko.mk: use ${ECHO_CMD} in post-patch-SNDIO-on

  Currently ${ECHO} is used which is problematic when it's set to 'true'
  e.g.  when using `make -s`.

  PR:		223964
  Approved by:	gecko (jbeich)

Changes:
  head/Mk/bsd.gecko.mk
